TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241565. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 10 side b of tape (track 6-7): Christian songs to Aboriginal melodies, sung in the Seediq. The song titles are: 6) I Was Lost; 7) Ten Virgins. Recorded in 1950s.
